transcript: Speaker A: તું કેટલા દિવસ થી કરસ છે? [How many days have you been doing this?] Speaker B: કદાચ ૧૦ થી ૧૨ દિવસ થયા હશે. [Probably 10 to 12 days.] Speaker A: તો હવે બેટર લાગે છે? [So does it feel better now?] Speaker B: હા, I speak English very confidently now. Speaker A: ઓહ, જોરદાર ઇંગ્લિશ મોડ માં લાગ્યો છે તું તો. [Oh, you seem to be in a great English mode.] Speaker C: MySivi એપ પર ૧ કરોડ લોકો સ્પોકન ઇંગ્લિશ ની પ્રેક્ટિસ કરી રહ્યા છે. તમે પણ આજે જ શરૂ કરો. ટ્રાયલ ફક્ત ૧ રૂપિયા માં. [Over 1 crore people are practicing spoken English on the MySivi app. You should also start today. Trial for just 1 Rupee.]
on_screen_text: Be polite and respect the other person's opinion. Avoid rude comments. Rani, Akash. practices for an average of 6 minutes/call. 28:13 minutes remaining for today's call. Call may be recorded to ensure a quality experience. MySivi. Start English Learning - MySivi. 10M+ Downloads. Install. MySivi AI English Speaking... Master Spoken Eng. Sharpen your English 1-on-1 calls. Try MySivi fast. MySivi Premium. LIMITED TIME OFFER. ₹1. Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today. 24/7 AI English Teacher. 500+ Exercises and Lessons. Unlimited Access.
summary: The ad showcases a simulated call between two users of the MySivi app, highlighting how just 10-12 days of practice has significantly boosted one user's English-speaking confidence. The narrator promotes the app's popularity with over 10 million downloads and urges viewers to install it. The call to action invites users to start a trial for just ₹1.
